calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-21-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Cowan appeared by zoom for George White.
Rita Holder appeared by zoom for Nicole Strain (trustee of the Willie Andrews Trust).

Mr. Cowan apologized to the court for his failure to appear stating that it was a miscalendared event. Mr. Cowan also stated that there was no mediation in this case, but he is willing to mediate. Mrs. Holder stated that she is willing to mediate, but active trust administration is going on, that Nicole was nominated as the administrator, but has declined to act, and that this was filed by a nephew as a creditor. Mrs. Holder also stated that she got all of the checks, that it looks like he has already been paid, that they need a new nominee, that the nephew is also a beneficiary of the trust and that she believes it is a conflict. In addition, Mrs. Holder stated that he is asking for money for asset management and for providing care, and asked that this petition be dismissed. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, and status of mediation are off calendar. The court encouraged the parties to meet and confer. Mr. Cowan was advised to use the same case number if and when filing a new petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To May-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To May-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rita Holder appeared by zoom for Nicole Strain (trustee).

Mrs. Holder stated that she does not know where the other attorney is, that this has to do with a creditor, but he is a nephew and that they did not have mediation yet. The clerk placed a call to Mr. Cowan's office, but no one answered. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Petitioner George White and the Attorney Robert Cowan to appear on May 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. An order to show cause re sanctions is also being issued for the same date for Attorney Robert to appear and show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Status of mediation, and the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are also continued to May 21, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2024 Continued To Apr-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Robert Cowan, Esq., for George White, Petitioner.

Rita Holder, Esq., for Nicole Strain, proposed Executor.

The court and Mr. Cowan discuss the procedural issues that require his attention, as noted in the court's tentative ruling. The court points Mr. Cowan to the issues indicated in numbers seven (7), and nine (9). At the conclusion of discussion, the matter is continued to Apr-09-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Mr. Cowan is instructed to clear the procedural issues by Mar-26-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Prado. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Continued To Feb-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):
Robert Cowan, Esq., for George White, Petitioner.
Rita Holder, Esq., for Nicole Strain, proposed Executor.

At the court's query, Mr. Cowan reports that he has a supplement ready for filing. Ms. Holder reports that her client is amenable to act as Executor. The court and the parties discuss mediation. The parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Mar-26-2024. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Apr-02-2024. The Parties are to return on Apr-09-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

The subject matter is continued to Feb-13-2023. Any papers to clear the Examiner's Notes are to be filed by Jan-30-2024.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nam. Not Reported.
